summary: Created impossibility_audit.py CLI tool that scans N5 artifacts (learnings, deposits, build lessons) for ceiling beliefs using the impossibility_detector module from D1.2. Supports table, JSON, and markdown output formats, handles missing files gracefully, and includes audit_before_build() function for Pulse integration.
decisions: Used detect_impossibility() from impossibility_detector module rather than reimplementing pattern matching
Combined multiple text fields (summary, notes, key_findings, etc.) when scanning deposits
Exit code 1 on high-severity findings for CI/CD blocking use case
notes_for_orchestrator: The script successfully tested with all CLI commands (learnings, build, builds, file, all) and output formats (table, json, markdown). The audit_before_build() function returns can_proceed boolean and blocking_issues list for Pulse integration. No ceiling beliefs found in current N5 artifacts during testing.
